calendar.matters:
HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Morgan Cahill-Marsland; Nixon Peabody LLP; 415-984-8200; appearing as counsel for respondent 10-81-1083-1085-1087 Mississippi Street Homeowners Association.
Steven S. Miyake; 415-421-4400; appearing as counsel for claimant Olusoji A. Fanoiki.

Mr. Miyake contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS: 1081-1083-1085-1087 Mississippi Street Homeowners Associations' Claim is granted in full, plus interest rate at 12%. HOA to submit a proposed order with the total amount due through August 1, 2023 at the time of the hearing. Olusoji Fanoiki's claim is granted to the extent any amounts remain after the satisfaction of the HOA claim.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Morgan Cahill-Marsland; Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP; 415-926-7600; appearing as counsel for Respondent 1081-1083-1085-1087 Mississippi Street Homeowners Association.
Steven S. Miyake; 415-421-4400; appearing as counsel for Interpleader Respondent/Claimant Olusoji A. Fanoiki.

Hearing held. The parties discuss the previous hearing and reason for a shortened continuance. Mr. Miyake asks that the court make a rulilng today. The court states it is not in a position to rule on the matter today and suggests a continuance. Both sides state they would need to meet and confer and consult their clients in order to determine an agreeable hearing date. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS is continued to August 1, 2023. Parties to file supplemental briefs regarding the finality of the foreclosure sale, redemption rights, and their impact on the junior lien at least 5 days prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Continued To Jun-30-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Steven Miyake ESQ (415)421-4400 appearing via Zoom for claimant Olusoji a Fanoiki, Trustee of the Olusoji A.
Morgan Cahill-Marsland (415)926-7600 of Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP appearing via Zoom for 1081-1083-1085-1087 Mississippi HOA.

Hearing held. The Court rules as follows:
